docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LESACA, RAYMUNDO SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-13-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-07-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELTZER, ALAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1450 CLAY STREET, #24, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, ACTUAL EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL OCTOBER 15, 1995, BUT BECAUSE IT IS A SUNDAY, COMPUTER MOVES IT TO OCTOBER 16, 1995.
